example: She wore an elegant dress to the formal dinner party last night.
exampleZh: 她昨晚穿了一条优雅的裙子参加正式晚宴。

example: The ballerina moved across the stage with remarkable grace and poise.
exampleZh: 那位芭蕾舞者以非凡的优雅和自信在舞台上移动。

example: His dishonest actions brought disgrace upon the entire family name.
exampleZh: 他不诚实的行为给整个家族名声带来了耻辱。

example: The snow began to glitter under the bright morning sunshine.
exampleZh: 雪在明亮的晨光下开始闪闪发光。

example: The campfire continued to glow long after everyone had gone to sleep.
exampleZh: 在所有人都入睡后，篝火依然在发光。

example: The pain will gradually diminish after you take the prescribed medicine.
exampleZh: 服用处方药后，疼痛会逐渐减轻。

example: It was a miracle that the child survived the terrible car accident.
exampleZh: 那个孩子在可怕的车祸中幸存下来真是一个奇迹。

example: Lack of funding is the biggest obstacle to completing the research project.
exampleZh: 缺乏资金是完成这个研究项目的最大障碍。

example: The conflict between the two nations lasted for more than a decade.
exampleZh: 两国之间的冲突持续了十多年。

example: The country held its first democratic election after years of authoritarian rule.
exampleZh: 经过多年的威权统治后，该国举行了首次民主选举。

example: The two companies have been fierce rivals in the smartphone market for years.
exampleZh: 这两家公司多年来在智能手机市场上一直是激烈的竞争对手。

example: The dim lighting in the restaurant created a cozy and romantic atmosphere.
exampleZh: 餐厅里昏暗的灯光营造出温馨浪漫的氛围。

example: She faced a dilemma between accepting the job offer and continuing her studies.
exampleZh: 她在接受工作机会和继续学业之间面临两难境地。

example: The architect carefully measured the dimensions of the room before designing the layout.
exampleZh: 建筑师在设计布局之前仔细测量了房间的尺寸。

example: The news of the earthquake caused great distress among the local community.
exampleZh: 地震的消息在当地社区引起了极大的痛苦。

example: Too much stress at work can negatively affect your physical and mental health.
exampleZh: 工作压力过大会对你的身心健康产生负面影响。

example: Many English words derive from Latin and ancient Greek roots.
exampleZh: 许多英语单词源自拉丁语和古希腊语词根。

example: No one should be deprived of the right to receive a proper education.
exampleZh: 任何人都不应被剥夺接受适当教育的权利。

example: The small business began to thrive after the new manager took over operations.
exampleZh: 新经理接手运营后，这家小企业开始蓬勃发展。

example: We should always strive to become better versions of ourselves every single day.
exampleZh: 我们应当每天努力成为更好的自己。

example: She somehow contrived to finish all the work before the tight deadline.
exampleZh: 她不知怎么设法在紧迫的截止日期前完成了所有工作。

example: The contract contained several ambiguous clauses that led to a legal dispute.
exampleZh: 合同中有几条含糊不清的条款，导致了法律纠纷。

example: Please delete all unnecessary files to free up space on the hard drive.
exampleZh: 请删除所有不必要的文件以释放硬盘空间。

example: It is sometimes difficult to discern the truth from a web of lies.
exampleZh: 有时很难从谎言的罗网中辨别真相。

example: Having relevant work experience is highly desirable for this job position.
exampleZh: 拥有相关工作经验对于这个职位来说是非常可取的。

example: Many people chose to donate money to help the victims of the natural disaster.
exampleZh: 许多人选择捐款帮助自然灾害的受害者。

example: She was filled with despair when she heard the devastating news about her friend.
exampleZh: 当她听到关于朋友的毁灭性消息时，她充满了绝望。

example: The desperate parents searched everywhere for their missing child throughout the night.
exampleZh: 绝望的父母整夜到处寻找他们失踪的孩子。

example: The factory was fined for discharging toxic waste into the nearby river.
exampleZh: 该工厂因向附近河流排放有毒废物而被罚款。

example: It takes time to digest a large meal, so do not exercise immediately after eating.
exampleZh: 消化一顿大餐需要时间，所以饭后不要立即运动。

example: He looked at the rotten food with obvious disgust on his face.
exampleZh: 他看着腐烂的食物，脸上露出明显的厌恶。

example: Please sign this document before we can proceed with the application process.
exampleZh: 在我们继续办理申请之前，请签署这份文件。

example: Her status in the company rose significantly after the successful product launch.
exampleZh: 产品成功推出后，她在公司的地位显著提升。

example: A beautiful marble statue stood in the center of the town square.
exampleZh: 一座美丽的大理石雕像矗立在城镇广场的中央。

example: The soldiers fought bravely to liberate the city from enemy occupation.
exampleZh: 士兵们英勇作战，将城市从敌人占领中解放出来。

example: The jury took three hours to deliberate before reaching a final verdict.
exampleZh: 陪审团花了三个小时仔细商议后才达成最终裁决。

example: She decided to devote her entire life to helping underprivileged children in rural areas.
exampleZh: 她决定将自己的一生奉献给帮助农村贫困儿童。

example: The author dedicated her latest novel to her loving and supportive parents.
exampleZh: 作者将她最新的小说献给她充满爱心和支持的父母。

example: The delicate glass vase must be handled with extreme care during transportation.
exampleZh: 这个精致的玻璃花瓶在运输过程中必须极其小心地处理。

example: If you do not brush your teeth regularly, they will eventually decay.
exampleZh: 如果不定期刷牙，牙齿最终会蛀坏。

example: Constant rainfall over the years has gradually eroded the soft limestone cliffs.
exampleZh: 多年来的持续降雨逐渐侵蚀了柔软的石灰岩悬崖。

example: She has always been a strong advocate for environmental protection and sustainable development.
exampleZh: 她一直是环境保护和可持续发展的坚定倡导者。

example: His rude remarks provoked a heated argument among the guests at the party.
exampleZh: 他粗鲁的言论在派对上激起了宾客之间的激烈争论。

example: The water in the puddle will evaporate quickly under the hot summer sun.
exampleZh: 水坑里的水在炎热的夏日阳光下会很快蒸发。

example: The bullet failed to penetrate the thick steel armor of the military vehicle.
exampleZh: 子弹未能穿透军用车辆的厚钢装甲。

example: I need some time to acquaint myself with the new software system.
exampleZh: 我需要一些时间来熟悉新的软件系统。

example: After four years of study, he earned a bachelor's degree in computer science.
exampleZh: 经过四年的学习，他获得了计算机科学学士学位。

example: Young children are apt to make mistakes when learning a new language.
exampleZh: 幼儿在学习新语言时容易犯错误。

example: Most students opted to take the online course instead of the in-person class.
exampleZh: 大多数学生选择了在线课程而不是线下课程。

example: Attendance at the workshop is optional, but it is highly recommended for beginners.
exampleZh: 参加研讨会是可选的，但强烈推荐初学者参加。

example: Education is compulsory for all children between the ages of six and sixteen.
exampleZh: 所有六至十六岁的儿童都必须接受义务教育。

example: All employees must comply with the company's safety regulations at all times.
exampleZh: 所有员工必须始终遵守公司的安全规定。

example: We must abide by the rules of the organization if we want to remain members.
exampleZh: 如果我们想继续成为成员，就必须遵守组织的规定。

example: The teacher always emphasizes the importance of regular practice in learning English.
exampleZh: 老师总是强调定期练习在学习英语中的重要性。

example: The project expended a great deal of time and resources before its completion.
exampleZh: 该项目在完成之前花费了大量的时间和资源。

example: The costly mistake forced the company to rebuild the entire production line.
exampleZh: 这个代价高昂的错误迫使公司重建整条生产线。

example: The memory of that painful experience still haunted her many years later.
exampleZh: 多年后，那段痛苦经历的记忆仍然困扰着她。

example: He was able to spot the rare bird through his binoculars from a long distance.
exampleZh: 他能够通过双筒望远镜从远处发现那只珍稀鸟类。

example: The young athlete showed great potential and was expected to become a champion.
exampleZh: 这位年轻运动员展现出巨大的潜力，有望成为冠军。

example: The atmosphere in the meeting room became very tense during the heated debate.
exampleZh: 在激烈的辩论中，会议室的气氛变得非常紧张。

example: She enrolled in an intensive English course to prepare for the university entrance exam.
exampleZh: 她报名参加了一个强化英语课程，为大学入学考试做准备。

example: The intense heat of the desert made it nearly impossible to travel during the day.
exampleZh: 沙漠的酷热使得白天几乎无法旅行。

example: She had a strong sense that something was wrong when she entered the room.
exampleZh: 当她进入房间时，她强烈地感觉到有些不对劲。

example: Her skin is very sensitive to sunlight, so she always wears sunscreen outdoors.
exampleZh: 她的皮肤对阳光非常敏感，所以她在户外总是涂防晒霜。

example: The senseless violence in the city has caused widespread fear among the residents.
exampleZh: 这座城市毫无意义的暴力行为在居民中引起了广泛的恐惧。

example: It would be sensible to save some money each month for unexpected emergencies.
exampleZh: 每月存一些钱以备不时之需是明智的做法。

example: It is just common sense to look both ways before crossing a busy street.
exampleZh: 过繁忙的街道前先看两边只是常识。

example: Everything he said about the incident was complete nonsense and had no factual basis.
exampleZh: 他对那件事所说的一切完全是胡说八道，没有任何事实依据。

example: The new movie caused a worldwide sensation and broke multiple box office records.
exampleZh: 这部新电影在全球引起了轰动，打破了多项票房纪录。

example: Drinking too much alcohol can cause serious harm to your liver over time.
exampleZh: 长期过量饮酒会对肝脏造成严重伤害。

example: The athlete injured his knee during training and had to withdraw from the competition.
exampleZh: 这位运动员在训练中伤了膝盖，不得不退出比赛。

example: The firefighters worked through the night to rescue people trapped in the burning building.
exampleZh: 消防员彻夜工作，营救被困在着火大楼里的人们。

example: If you wash this sweater in hot water, it will likely shrink in size.
exampleZh: 如果你用热水洗这件毛衣，它很可能会缩水。

example: The color of the curtains began to fade after years of exposure to direct sunlight.
exampleZh: 在多年的阳光直射下，窗帘的颜色开始褪色。

example: The prolonged drought caused a severe famine that affected millions of people.
exampleZh: 持续的干旱造成了严重的饥荒，影响了数百万人。

example: Her strange behavior continues to puzzle her friends and family members.
exampleZh: 她奇怪的行为一直让她的朋友和家人感到困惑。

example: She is very particular about the food she eats and only chooses organic products.
exampleZh: 她对自己吃的食物非常讲究，只选择有机产品。

example: The doctor decided to specialize in pediatric medicine after years of general practice.
exampleZh: 经过多年的全科实践后，这位医生决定专攻儿科医学。

example: Can you give me a more specific example to help me understand the concept better?
exampleZh: 你能给我一个更具体的例子来帮助我更好地理解这个概念吗？

example: There was a peculiar smell coming from the old abandoned house on the hill.
exampleZh: 山上的那座废弃老房子散发出一种奇怪的气味。

example: The construction site was closed to the public for safety and security reasons.
exampleZh: 出于安全和安保原因，建筑工地对公众关闭。

example: The researcher was asked to cite all the sources she used in her academic paper.
exampleZh: 研究者被要求在学术论文中引用她使用的所有来源。

example: He began his speech by quoting a famous line from Shakespeare's Hamlet.
exampleZh: 他引用莎士比亚《哈姆雷特》中一句著名台词开始了演讲。

example: The quality of the counterfeit product is clearly inferior to that of the original.
exampleZh: 假冒产品的质量明显低于正品。

example: This brand of coffee is far superior to any other brand I have ever tried.
exampleZh: 这个品牌的咖啡比我尝试过的任何其他品牌都要好得多。

example: The orchestra delivered a superb performance that earned a standing ovation from the audience.
exampleZh: 管弦乐队奉献了一场极好的演出，赢得了观众起立鼓掌。

example: The Supreme Court is the highest judicial body in the country's legal system.
exampleZh: 最高法院是该国法律体系中最高的司法机构。

example: The team's technical superiority helped them win the championship for the third time.
exampleZh: 该队的技术优势帮助他们第三次赢得了冠军。

example: The old superstition says that breaking a mirror brings seven years of bad luck.
exampleZh: 古老的迷信说打碎镜子会带来七年的厄运。

example: People from different religions gathered together to pray for world peace.
exampleZh: 来自不同宗教的人们聚集在一起为世界和平祈祷。

example: The editor removed all superfluous words from the article to make it more concise.
exampleZh: 编辑删除了文章中所有多余的词语，使其更加简洁。

example: Prior experience in customer service is required for this particular job opening.
exampleZh: 这个特定职位空缺要求有客户服务经验。

example: The heavy financial burden of the loan weighed on the family for many years.
exampleZh: 贷款的沉重经济负担压在这个家庭身上多年。

example: The energetic puppy ran around the garden all afternoon without any sign of tiredness.
exampleZh: 这只精力充沛的小狗整个下午在花园里跑来跑去，毫无疲倦的迹象。

example: Regular vigorous exercise can significantly improve your cardiovascular health over time.
exampleZh: 定期进行剧烈运动可以随着时间的推移显著改善心血管健康。

example: The company is looking for a dynamic leader who can drive innovation and growth.
exampleZh: 公司正在寻找一位能推动创新和增长的有活力的领导者。

example: The tailor can alter the dress to fit you perfectly by the end of the week.
exampleZh: 裁缝可以在本周结束前把裙子改得完全合你的身。

example: We need to find an alternative route because the main road is under construction.
exampleZh: 我们需要找一条替代路线，因为主路正在施工。

example: The airplane reached an altitude of thirty thousand feet shortly after taking off.
exampleZh: 飞机起飞后不久达到了三万英尺的高度。

example: The city is located at a latitude that enjoys a warm and pleasant climate all year.
exampleZh: 这座城市位于一个全年享有温暖宜人气候的纬度。

example: The salesman offered us a free sample of the new cheese to try at the store.
exampleZh: 销售员在店里给我们提供了一份免费的新奶酪样品来品尝。

example: The biologist collected a specimen of the rare plant for further laboratory analysis.
exampleZh: 生物学家采集了这种稀有植物的标本以进行进一步的实验室分析。

example: The computer virus infected thousands of systems before the security patch was released.
exampleZh: 在安全补丁发布之前，该计算机病毒感染了数千个系统。

example: Washing your hands regularly helps prevent the spread of harmful bacteria and germs.
exampleZh: 经常洗手有助于防止有害细菌和病菌的传播。

example: Cover your mouth when you sneeze to avoid spreading germs to people around you.
exampleZh: 打喷嚏时捂住嘴，以免将病菌传播给周围的人。

example: The doctor advised him to avoid alcohol completely while taking the prescribed medication.
exampleZh: 医生建议他在服用处方药期间完全避免饮酒。

example: The government has set up a special fund to support small and medium-sized businesses.
exampleZh: 政府设立了一个专项基金来支持中小企业。

example: The store offered a full refund when the customer returned the defective product.
exampleZh: 当顾客退回有缺陷的产品时，商店提供了全额退款。

example: The factory must dispose of all chemical waste in an environmentally safe manner.
exampleZh: 工厂必须以对环境安全的方式处理所有化学废料。

example: Regular physical activity is essential for maintaining good health as you age.
exampleZh: 定期进行身体活动对于随着年龄增长保持健康至关重要。

example: Taking breaks during work hours is important for maintaining good mental health.
exampleZh: 在工作时间休息对于保持良好的心理健康很重要。

example: Learning the fundamental rules of grammar is essential for mastering any foreign language.
exampleZh: 学习语法基本规则对于掌握任何外语都至关重要。

example: The driver suffered fatal injuries in the head-on collision on the highway last night.
exampleZh: 昨晚高速公路上迎面相撞的车祸中，司机受了致命伤。

example: The total cost of the renovation project exceeded the original budget by twenty percent.
exampleZh: 翻修项目的总成本超出了原预算的百分之二十。

example: The company is investing heavily in digital technology to transform its traditional business model.
exampleZh: 公司正在大力投资数字技术以转变其传统商业模式。

example: She discovered her talent for painting when she was only five years old.
exampleZh: 她仅在五岁时就发现了自己的绘画天赋。

example: Water is vital for the survival of all living organisms on this planet.
exampleZh: 水对于地球上所有生物的生存至关重要。

example: A balanced diet is essential for children's healthy growth and physical development.
exampleZh: 均衡的饮食对于儿童的健康成长和身体发育至关重要。

example: The next few months will be crucial for determining the future direction of the project.
exampleZh: 未来几个月对于决定项目的未来方向将是关键的。

example: Her years of experience made her an indispensable member of the research team.
exampleZh: 她多年的经验使她成为研究团队中不可或缺的一员。

example: It is imperative that we find a solution to this problem as soon as possible.
exampleZh: 当务之急是我们必须尽快找到这个问题的解决方案。

example: It would be naive to believe that success can be achieved without any hard work.
exampleZh: 相信不付出努力就能取得成功是天真的想法。

example: The court found the defendant innocent of all charges after a lengthy trial.
exampleZh: 经过漫长的审判后，法庭判决被告所有指控不成立。

example: The company offers financial incentives to employees who exceed their performance targets.
exampleZh: 公司向超额完成绩效目标的员工提供经济激励。

example: Everyone deserves a decent job that pays enough to support their family.
exampleZh: 每个人都应有一份体面的工作，足以养家糊口。

example: He felt guilty about lying to his best friend and decided to apologize sincerely.
exampleZh: 他对欺骗最好的朋友感到内疚，决定真诚地道歉。

example: She sat by the window to ponder the meaning of life and her future plans.
exampleZh: 她坐在窗边，思考生命的意义和未来的计划。

example: The old professor spoke in a ponderous tone that made the lecture difficult to follow.
exampleZh: 这位老教授用沉重乏味的语调讲话，使得讲座难以理解。

example: The company did not respond to my application until three weeks after I submitted it.
exampleZh: 公司直到我提交申请三周后才回复我。

example: Every citizen should be responsible for protecting the environment in their daily lives.
exampleZh: 每个公民都应该在日常生活中对保护环境负责。

example: The results of the experiment correspond perfectly with our earlier theoretical predictions.
exampleZh: 实验结果与我们早期的理论预测完全相符。

example: The teacher gave constructive feedback on each student's writing assignment last week.
exampleZh: 老师上周对每个学生的写作作业给出了建设性的反馈。

example: A major sports brand agreed to sponsor the young tennis player for the next five years.
exampleZh: 一家大型体育品牌同意在未来五年内赞助这位年轻的网球选手。

example: The crowd broke into spontaneous applause when the singer finished her beautiful performance.
exampleZh: 当歌手完成她精彩的表演时，观众自发地爆发出掌声。

example: We should solve problems through discussion rather than resort to violence.
exampleZh: 我们应该通过讨论解决问题，而不是诉诸暴力。

example: Reading regularly can help improve children's cognitive abilities and language development.
exampleZh: 经常阅读有助于提高儿童的认知能力和语言发展。

example: Young children often imitate the behavior and speech patterns of their parents at home.
exampleZh: 年幼的孩子经常在家模仿父母的行为和说话模式。

example: The government plans to initiate a new program to reduce unemployment among young graduates.
exampleZh: 政府计划启动一项新计划以减少青年毕业生的失业。

example: They have been intimate friends since they first met in elementary school twenty years ago.
exampleZh: 自二十年前在小学初次见面以来，他们一直是亲密的朋友。

example: Experts estimate that the global population will reach nine billion by the year 2050.
exampleZh: 专家估计到2050年全球人口将达到90亿。

example: Winning an Olympic gold medal is the ultimate goal for most professional athletes worldwide.
exampleZh: 赢得奥运金牌是全球大多数职业运动员的终极目标。

example: Climate change has become one of the most pressing issues facing the world today.
exampleZh: 气候变化已成为当今世界面临的最紧迫问题之一。

example: The beautiful mountains surround the small village on all four sides.
exampleZh: 美丽的群山从四面八方环绕着这个小村庄。

example: Under no circumstance should you reveal your password to anyone else online.
exampleZh: 在任何情况下，你都不应在网上向任何人透露你的密码。

example: He decided to quit smoking after his doctor warned him about his poor lung condition.
exampleZh: 在医生警告他肺部状况不佳后，他决定戒烟。

example: A simple gesture of kindness can sometimes brighten someone's entire day significantly.
exampleZh: 一个简单的善意手势有时可以大大点亮某人的一整天。

example: Farmers sow their seeds in the spring and harvest the crops in the autumn.
exampleZh: 农民在春天播种，秋天收获庄稼。

example: If you work hard now, you will reap the rewards of your efforts in the future.
exampleZh: 如果你现在努力工作，将来就会收获努力的回报。

example: The farmers built a canal to irrigate their dry fields during the hot summer months.
exampleZh: 农民们修建了一条水渠在炎热的夏季灌溉他们干旱的田地。

example: Lack of sleep made him irritable and difficult to work with throughout the entire week.
exampleZh: 睡眠不足使他变得易怒，整个星期都难以共事。
